<result>{"scoreboard":[{"name":"DreamCart 3D — Minimal Retained-Mesh Contract (gfx3d)","overall":7.4},{"name":"DreamCart 3D: Batched Typed-Array Command-Buffer (DC3D)","overall":7.1},{"name":"DreamCart 3D — Engine-Independent Scene Description ("3 renderers, 1 logic")","overall":7.1}],"winner":"DreamCart 3D — Minimal Retained-Mesh Contract (gfx3d)","doc":"Wrote the definitive design document to `/Users/evan/code/dreamcart/docs/3d-design.md`.

It builds on the highest-scoring **minimal retained-mesh `g3d` contract** but grafts the verdict-mandated fixes from the other two proposals:

- **One batched `submit(buffer)` per frame** (one FFI crossing, O(1) regardless of object count) instead of per-object `drawMesh` calls — the leaf native work is identical but cheaper on QuickJS/PSP, and the buffer doubles as the test artifact.
- **Software reference rasterizer (`raster3d.ts`) committed in CI from day one**, not optional — the only CI-enforced visual-correctness check for winding/reversed-Z/tilt/transpose bugs the draw-list golden can't catch.
- **Deterministic shared `dsin/dcos/dsqrt`** in `math.ts` so emitted matrix bytes are bit-identical across QuickJS and the browser (the empirically-proven 1-ULP `Math.cos` divergence).
- **3DS screen tilt + projection baked into shared JS** so the golden describes what every host actually draws.

All nine required sections are present, grounded in the actual repo (real file paths: `framework/src/{math,host3d,mesh,g3d,scene3d}.ts`, `runtime/src/gfx3d.rs`, `runtime-3ds/source/vshader.v.pica`, `web/engine.js`; real conventions: `pack_abgr` ABGR, `// @ts-check` plain-JS games, `index.ts` exports, `golden.ts`/`contract.ts` extension pattern, `package.json` Bun scripts). The roadmap is M0→M6 (Web→PSP→3DS→racing→FPS) with a de-risking spike called out for each riskiest item, especially PSP `TRANSFORM_3D`/`sceGumLoadMatrix` layout and 3DS picasso build wiring."}</result>

<result>{"hosts":[{"platform":"web","filesChanged":["/Users/evan/code/dreamcart/web/engine.js"],"summary":"Implemented the WebGL2 `g3d` host in web/engine.js alongside the untouched Canvas2D `gfx`, per docs/3d-design.md §4.3 + §10.1.\\n\\nKey decisions:\\n- STACKED CANVASES: mount() now creates a second WebGL2 canvas (same 480x272 backing store) and inserts it as a sibling UNDERNEATH the existing HUD canvas in normal flow, then absolutely-overlays the HUD on top with a transparent background. Both are plain <canvas> elements so the page stylesheet's `canvas` rule (size, #000 bg, pixelated, border, radius, and the >=1280px media query) sizes them identically — they register pixel-for-pixel at every breakpoint with no CSS copying. PSPJS.mount(el) signature is unchanged.\\n- BACKGROUND FORK: added a `used3dThisFrame` flag, reset at the top of safeFrame() (before the game's frame()) and set true inside g3d.submit. gfx.clear does ctx.clearRect when 3D ran this frame (so the GL background shows through) and keeps today's exact opaque fillRect for 2D-only frames. gfx.fillRect is byte-identical (untouched, incl. the x|0 truncation).\\n- CONSTANTS: DC3D_MAGIC/DC3D_VERSION/OP_*/FMT_* declared one-per-line as `var NAME = 0x..;` so contract.ts's grep-parity passes (verified: now reports the web host wired, 9 consts, no mismatch).\\n- uploadMesh: per-handle VAO+VBO(+IBO for Uint16 indices), v1 attribs location 0 a_pos (3 f32 @4, stride 16) + location 1 a_color (4 unsigned-byte normalized @0, ABGR, stride 16); stores {vao,vbo,ibo,indexCount,vertexCount}. The host COPIES bytes via bufferData.\\n- One GLSL ES 3.00 program: gl_Position = u_viewProj * u_model * vec4(a_pos,1); outColor = v_color * u_tint; all uniformMatrix4fv(...,false,m) column-major (no transpose, matching raster3d/math.ts and the Y-flip already baked into the shared projection).\\n- submit: DataView parse keyed on DC3D_MAGIC; clears color to (0x10,0x14,0x1e) + depth; SET_CAMERA -> u_viewProj; DRAW -> u_model + tint (0xFFFFFFFF -> 1,1,1,1) + drawElements/drawA …[+6272 chars]

<result>{"reviewCount":5,"plan":"All findings verified against ground truth. The brief's analysis is accurate. Now synthesizing the prioritized plan.

# DreamCart `feat/3d-isomorphic` — Prioritized Refactor Plan

## 1. Verdict

The feature is **mergeable after a short, mostly-mechanical cleanup pass**. The core architecture is sound and on-hardware-verified: one wire contract (`g3d.ts`) is consumed consistently by all three hosts plus the `raster3d.ts` reference oracle, `contract.ts` enforces wire-constant parity and the no-`Math`-trig determinism guard, and the goldens pass green (15/15). The drift is real but shallow — it is concentrated in **stale comments and docs left behind by three late decisions** (Y-flip moved out of `math.ts` into per-host viewports; PSP `DepthRange` flipped to `(0,65535)`; 3DS tilt moved native) plus **leftover on-hardware debug code in the 3DS host that must not ship**. There are **no active correctness bugs** in shipped code paths; the one genuine *correctness risk* is a maintainer "fixing" working code back to a stale doc/comment (e.g. re-introducing the inside-out cube). The deeper architectural gap is that the three cross-cutting conventions (depth/clip, Y/winding/cull, color normalization) are pinned nowhere, so they will keep drifting — fixable with one conventions comment block, no code rewrite.

## 2. Must-fix before merge

Ordered: safe mechanical first, then the doc contradiction that is a latent correctness trap, then the latent test/contract holes.

### A. Remove leftover 3DS debug code (safe, mechanical — highest priority)
- **What:** `flog()`/`sdmc:` logger + one-shot `g_dbgLogged` matrix/projection diagnostic. Does blocking file I/O on the hot draw path.
- **Where:** `runtime-3ds/source/main.c:169-173` (the `g_dbgLogged` decl + `flog()`), `:167-168` (its introducing comment), and `:335-361` (the entire `if (!g_dbgLogged) { ... }` block in `js_g3d_submit`).
- **Edit:** Delete all three regions. Keep the real fixes around them (z-row negat …[+6304 chars]

ultracode 现在需要对 PSP 这个平台进行深度调研，主要包括以下几个方面：

1. 场景构建与资源整合
   (a) 研究如何在该平台上构建复杂的场景
   (b) 探索如何将现代开源的资产、素材及管线进行打包，并成功加载到平台中

2. 数据应用与兼容性
   (a) 获取真实的测试数据（如 glTF 格式或其他相关素材）
   (b) 调研骨骼动画等内容如何应用到该平台上

3. 硬件性能评估
   根据 PSP 实际的硬件机能进行推断，评估骨骼动画等功能的能力是否足以适配在该平台上使用 所以我的预期是，你在调研这些方案之后，完整地进行一个试验性的探索实现，用少数几个新的游戏场景例子把这个引擎搭出来。

这里的场景肯定需要来自真实资产（比如一些开源资产包的纹理或动画）。举几个例子：
1. 一个人在走
2. 一辆车在开
3. 一个 3D 的野外场景（开放世界可能太复杂了）

你需要通过下一个 PoC 去尝试，看看这些场景到底怎么被建模，最后怎么让业务逻辑用 JS 来写。要尽可能把它走通，把硬件的机能发挥到极致，以此来做一个测试。

   - GE FIXED vertex interleave order: `[weights][uv][color][normal][position]`, each 4-byte aligned, regardless of FMT bit values.

ultracode 现在我希望在这个 PSP 上，基于现在的工具链能力进一步扩展出一种功能：能够把我生活中的一些街道街景变成素材资源，并烘焙到游戏的场景里面，做一个可以让人物角色在其中行走的 Demo。

为了达到这个效果，我可能需要类似 OpenStreetMap 那种包含三维坐标信息的数据源。因为未来是想要做成一个 UGC 共创社区，所以我这肯定是非商用的。

针对这样的场景，我需要你帮我完成以下任务：

1. 尽可能多地调研有哪些现成的素材资源可以拿来使用。
2. 挑选一个你觉得比较有标志性的地点，将其建模并烘焙成在 PSP 里面可以玩的场景。

这里面已经有一个叫做 Adventure 3D 的简单室内场景，但接下来我希望能够指定世界上任何一个地点，把那个地方附近的街道或环境变成场景，让人物角色可以在那个局部场景里面走动。

希望你针对这一功能做深度的研究并实现它，把 Demo 跑通。

ultracode 现在场景里面有一个明显的渲染问题：随便走几步路，地面或者是墙面就会有一些面随机缺失，变成黑色。

可能是遮挡剔除的算法有问题，这是一个我感觉比较明显的 bug，需要修复。 有两个要修改的地方：

1. 士兵移动方向与朝向的优化
   现在士兵在上下左右移动时，虽然有走动动作，但始终面朝屏幕朝着玩家。实际上，当他往不同方向走的时候，模型应该自动旋转，让脸部转向对应的移动方向。这个模型本身的旋转逻辑需要实现。

2. 场景贴图与显存优化
   更核心的是场景贴图问题。以当前场景为例，我希望贴图能被完整烘焙出来，并合并成类似于 Atlas（图集）的形式，针对 PSP 的显存进行高度优化。

# GoldSrc BSP v30 and WAD3 Format System — Research Report

This report surveys the GoldSrc BSP v30 / WAD3 map ecosystem (Half-Life / Counter-Strike 1.6) from the perspective of the DreamCart engine team, synthesizing 8 research dimensions plus an audit of the project's existing capabilities. It covers content-analysis material, inspection/authoring toolchains, off-the-shelf engines and rendering implementations, a concrete plan for a Mac-side Metal native renderer, ground-truth cross-comparison methodology, and a Linux/Docker headless generation pipeline. # Plan: Guard-band tessellation for REAL maps (de_dust2) under budget

## 0. Reconciling the three briefings (the one decision that matters)

The briefings agree on mechanism but split on the starting `tess` value:

| Briefing | Recommends | Reasoning axis |
|---|---|---|
| STRATEGY/BUDGET | adaptive `clamp(span·0.08, 2, 8)` → dust2 ≈ **5.56 m** | byte-bounded; only huge faces split |
| GUARD-BAND MATH | fixed **1.5–2.0 m** (d_min=0.5 m, ±1024 guard) | screen-space guard-band safety |
| DE_DUST2 GROWTH | start **T≈6**, drop to **4** only if log fits; **1–4 m blow the pack** | measured (L/T)² explosion |

These conflict because GUARD-BAND derives the *ideal* edge (1.5 m) ignoring byte cost, while GROWTH shows anything <~6 m on dust2 forces decimation. The **adaptive `span·0.08` formula resolves the conflict**: it is byte-safe by construction (dust2 → 5.56 m, inside GROWTH's "fits" zone) AND it preserves the GUARD-BAND intent for small maps (a 10 m room clamps up to 2.0 m, the guard-band-safe value). So:

**Strategy: ADAPTIVE by span — `tess = clamp(span · 0.08, 2.0, 8.0)` metres.** Not a fixed value: a single fixed metre can't serve a 135 m map and a 10 m room at once, and any fixed value low enough to be guard-safe (1.5 m) blows dust2's pack. dust2 resolves to **≈5.56 m**, which both the GROWTH table (~1.0 MB, fits) and the guard-band logic (large faces near the player split a level or two) accept.

# White Album 2 文本数据集 → PSP 移植：技术综合分析

## 1. 仓库到底是什么

`/Users/evan/code/wa2_dataset_script` 是一个**纯文本**仓库：它包含《White Album 2》(WA2) 的**完整游戏脚本**（原始游戏引擎格式 `raw/`）、一份**清洗后的可读版本**（`processed/`），以及一整套用来构建「雪菜（Setsuna）角色聊天机器人」微调数据集的工具链（`scripts/`）。需要纠正一个误解：**这里没有视频、没有音频、没有 CG/立绘、没有 3D 模型**——用户提到的「提取 video/audio/character info」中，只有**剧本/台词**以及**从台词中可推导的角色信息**真实存在。换句话说，这是 WA2 的「文字部分」，不是游戏本体的素材包。

## 2. 数据格式总览

### 2.1 原始格式 `raw/*.txt`（223 个文件，每文件 = 一个场景）

每个文件是**一整条超长物理行**，字段以**逗号 `,` 分隔**，UTF-8。关键怪癖：

- 文件**第一个字节就是 `,`**（一个空的前导字段 `empty_lead`），结尾同样以 id + 一个空尾字段收束。（注意：用 Read 工具看到的 `1\t` 是 `cat -n` 行号，不是文件内容。）
- 字段内的换行是**字面 2 字符 `\n`（反斜杠+n）**，不是真换行；解析时 `line.replace('\\n','\n')`。

每个字段是以下之一：

| 字段类型 | 识别规则 | 示例 |
|---|---|---|
| `speaker` 说话人 | 紧跟在对话字段**前面**的那个字段 | `武也`、`雪菜`、角色标签 `軽音部員`、占位符 `？？？` |
| `dialogue` 对话 | `「…」`（普通）或 `『…』`（强调/引用/画外/特殊） | `「離せよ！\nてか…」` |
| `narration` 旁白 | 「其它一切」——非引号包裹、非说话人、非命令的日文 | `とうとう、降ってきた。` |
| `resource_triplet` 资源三连 | `name.tga`,`(空)`,`grp`(图层) / `bak`(背景) | `ギター.tga,,grp` |
| 效果/动画 | `*.AMP`（滤镜，如 `sepia.AMP`）、`*.ani`（`スポットライト.ani`） | `sepia.AMP` |
| `mv_token` | `mv01`–`mv24`，转场/演出指令 | `mv01` |
| `catch_token` | `CATCH` / `CATCH2` / `CATCH3`，章节/eyecatch 分隔 | `CATCH2` |
| `scene_link_id` | **行尾的数字 id** = 下一场景文件名；多个 id = 分支/选择 | `…,CATCH,1002,` |

**内联标记**：
- Ruby/注音 `<R基字\|读音>`（如 `<R空港\|ここ>`，220 处，清洗后只保留基字 `空港`）；
- 字号 `<F16…>` / 样式 `<S0/S9…>`；
- **逐字停顿 `<W7…>`/`<w200…>`（1581 处，最常见的标签）**，常一个字一个标签地包裹高潮台词做「慢速逐字显示」，如 `『<W7>Ｗ<W7>Ｈ<W7>Ｉ…』` = 慢慢揭示 `WHITE ALBUM`。

**场景链接**：文件名 `<id>.txt` 是**自身** id，**行尾数字**指向**下一**场景。id 为 4 位（`1001`/`2001`…），可带 `_NNN` 子场景（`1008_020`，步长 10）和 `_N` 变体（`3014_2`）。千位数字分章节区块（见第 3 节）。哨兵：`終了`=结束，`2025`=「待续」式终端标记。`mv`/`CATCH` 通常紧贴行尾 id 作为进入下一场景的转场。

# IC code → character (+pose) binding — REVERSED

## The key finding: there is NO LoadBmp/register op. `code` IS the speaker code.

The sprite ops `0x9a/0x9b/0x9c` carry `code` as their first arg. That `code` is the **same id-space as the speaker code in `0x8a`** (`0x8a [code,256,0,0,lineCtr]`), which is wrapped by the preceding `0x90 [fieldIdx]` that names the speaker. None of the unknown ops (`0x8f,0x9e,0x9f,0xa5,0xa6,0xa7,0xa8,0xaa…`) carry a char.pak resource id or pose — I dumped them all; they are camera/fade/audio/timing ops (e.g. `0x9e [layer,dur,?,alpha]`, `0x8f [dur,0]` fade-out). The binding is a **fixed per-chapter slot table**, not data in the op stream.

## The resolver (proven)

A sprite filename is `<char3><pose3><expr3>.tga`. From a SHOW op `0x9a [code, face, dur, ...]`:
- **`char3`** = `IC_CODE2CHAR[code]` (the fixed table below)
- **`expr3`** = `face` directly (the script's `face` value IS the 3-digit expression: face 222 → expr `222`, face 103 → `103`)
- **`pose3`** = the lowest pose `001..` for which `<char3><pose><face>.tga` exists in IC/char.pak (main cast = `001`; one-shot teachers = `002`). The `face`'s leading digit is an emotion *group* (1xx/2xx/3xx), not the pose.

```ts
const IC_CODE2CHAR: Record<number,string> = {
  1:"kaz", 2:"set", 10:"tak", 11:"ioo", 12:"chi",  // 17/18 = teachers (pose 002, ambiguous)
};
function resolveIcSprite(code:number, face:number): string {
  const c = IC_CODE2CHAR[code]; if(!c) return "";
  for (let p=1; p<=10; p++){ const fn=`${c}${String(p).padStart(3,"0")}${String(face).padStart(3,"0")}.tga`;
    if (charPakHas(fn)) return fn; }
  return "";
}
```

<result>{"report":"# PocketJS Video Component — Native Media Engine Playback: Engineering Report

Scope: real-time playback of a 480×272 stream sitting on the dev host, reached from the PSP as `host0:/…` over PSPLink, composited as a native Video node inside the PocketJS flexbox tree at 60 fps, with decode offloaded to the Media Engine so QuickJS + Taffy layout stay free. We fully control the encode.

Every load-bearing claim below is tagged against the verified dossier. Claims marked REFUTED or UNCERTAIN are called out inline and routed around.

---

## 1. PSP native video decode — the landscape

**The Media Engine (ME).** The PSP has a second MIPS core (the "Media Engine") plus fixed-function AVC/JPEG hardware and a VME for colorspace conversion. `avcodec.prx` exports the whole family — `sceMpeg`, `sceVideocodec`, `sceJpeg`, `sceMpegbase` (CSC), `sceAudiocodec`, `sceAtrac`. All of them dispatch the actual decode to the ME via `sceMeVideo`/`sceMeCore` RPC and the caller **sleeps on an event flag** until the ME signals completion (CONFIRMED for both `sceMpegAvcDecode` and `sceJpegDecodeMJpeg`). Consequence that dominates the whole design: **every decode entry point is a blocking, thread-suspending call.** The main CPU is freed *because the caller yields to other threads*, not because the call returns early. So "keep QuickJS at 60 fps" is achieved by **running decode on a dedicated kernel thread**, regardless of which codec we pick — not by choosing one codec over another.

**The three video paths + MJPEG:**

- **`sceMpeg` (low-level ME AVC).** You own the file read and feed a 2048-byte-packet ringbuffer; the lib demuxes a PSMF-framed MPEG-2 Program Stream, decodes H.264, and `sceMpegAvcDecode` does YCbCr→ABGR8888 CSC straight into a **caller-supplied main-RAM buffer at 512 stride** (CONFIRMED). Requires PSMF framing — *not* raw Annex-B (CONFIRMED).
- **`scePsmfPlayer` (high-level, batteries-included).** Opens a `.pmf` **by filename over any IO path incl. `host0:/`** (CONFIRMED), spins up its **own read+demux+decode thread  …[+7203 chars]

## Summary verdict

I found **no hard compile errors** — every `scePsmfPlayer*`, `sceKernel*`, `sceGu*`, `sceUtilityLoadAvModule`, and `sceMpegInit` call matches the rust-psp signatures exactly, all enum/const/type names exist, and the no_std/alloc imports are correct. The real problems are **logic/runtime bugs**, one of which will make looping videos hang.

---

## Ranked findings

### 1. (HIGH, logic) Loop config value is inverted — looping videos never loop and spin forever
`native/src/video.rs:197` — `scePsmfPlayerConfigPlayer(&mut *c.player, PsmfConfigMode::Loop, 1)`.
The PSMF loop config-attr values are `PSMF_PLAYER_CONFIG_LOOP = 0` (enable) and `PSMF_PLAYER_CONFIG_NO_LOOP = 1` (disable), confirmed in both pspsdk and PPSSPP. Passing `1` under `if loop_playback` therefore **disables** looping. Worse, it interacts with the poll thread: `poll_main` only handles `PlayingFinished` when `!c.loop_playback` (`video.rs:345`), so a video opened with `loop_playback=true` (a) never actually loops and (b) never reports `ENDED`; it falls through to `Update`+`GetVideoData`, which now error every iteration, busy-looping at 8 ms (`video.rs:379-381`) with the picture frozen on the last frame. **Fix: pass `0`.**

### 2. (MED, logic) PAUSE doesn't pause the player — resume jumps forward in time
`native/src/video.rs:334-338`. PAUSE just stops *pulling* frames (`continue` without `Update`/`GetVideoData`). The player's internal ME/av-sync clock keeps running, so on resume `GetVideoData` returns a much later frame — a visible time jump, and the internal ring buffers can over/underflow while "paused". A real pause needs `scePsmfPlayerChangePlayMode(player, PsmfPlayerMode::Pause, 0)` (that binding exists at `psmf.rs:3 …[+6524 chars]

在 github pocket-stack 组织下新建一个 open-strike 项目，把目前的整个 example 迁移过去。这个 open-strike 应该不仅复用你刚刚实现的 pocket3d 的能力，还应该复用 pocketjs 的基建，通过 solid 渲染 overlay UI（现在的简陋 overlay 直接替换重写一版更适合 FPS 气质的）。同时 open-strike 的 gameplay 也需要引入 quickjs，这个最好也由 pocketjs 提供相应的引擎基建来复用，作为一种 mod runtime 能力。这方面我的愿景是可以模糊 App 和 Game 之间的边界，它们都应该在保持高性能前提下，具备能通过 JavaScript 进行自由定制的能力。pocketjs 的渲染架构后续应该会在裸的 3D 基础上提供出很多特化的 runtime，比如现有的 PSP UI 是一种 runtime，而现在 3D FPS 是封装出的另一种 runtime。对于其他很多类型的游戏，也都可以针对每种类别去专门做出 Rust core runtime + JS mod runtime，换句话说，整个 pocketjs 不是一个想要做成 Unreal 那样大而全的通用引擎，而是特化出很多种小的专有引擎，并在此之上封装出最适合相应场景的扩展 API（比如对 2D UI 是 jsx，对 FPS 应该是 mod）。我希望据此探索出一种更像 Roblox 的扩展架构，这是极其有价值的事情，所以希望你从本体论的视角出发，抽象出最适合最优雅的扩展机制，应用到当前这个重构需求中。这是最主要的事情。

另外一个主要问题要修复的是，整个游戏过程中枪的位置会一直频繁抖动，非常影响观感。然后人物我不喜欢用现在这个卡通人物。有一个 Soldier 应该也是开源的，可以导入进来替换掉看看。

然后相对次要的，是 pocketjs 现在渲染到 PSP 的 UI 也应该顺便能渲染到原生 macOS，这样 2D 和 3D 至少就有同一份底座。最后 landing page 也顺便加上 3D 部分，并在支持平台章节加上 macOS。

~/code/paperboy 这里有我们自研的 IM，它现在是用 React Native 做 Mobile 端。然后 IM 引擎 satchel 后面是准备开源的。我希望直接来试验用 pocketjs 去实现一个类似 React Native 的跨端方案，其中的样式就直接用现在的 Tailwind 原生方式来实现，绘制我还不确定是 iOS 原生还是走 Skia，这个你可以根据哪一个更符合 IM 长列表需求来决定。但总之，我会希望能够通过 pocketjs 的 iOS 版来支持将 IM 引擎的数据层以更高效的形式在 Web 端复用。所以 iOS 版应该要能够从 0 到 1 去以此做一个架构设计，还有满足 IM 长列表的方案设计。这种满足应该是以 Paperboy 这种当前已经有比较复杂的业务的满足为目标。最简单的 demo 应该只要包含所有会话列表和点击进入后的具体消息列表（即某个聊天的具体消息内容）即可，UI 结构应该是用 Tailwind 你可以自由发挥。这种列表是一个无限长列表，所以需要专门设计好它的工程架构，保证它流畅。并且对于那种动态回填的场景，不应该频繁出现跳动，这是现在不那么好做的事情。所以我希望你能从 0 到 1 完成这个把 pocketjs 支持到 iOS 上并打磨跑通生产级 IM 应用 UX 的工作。你可以在这些需求前提下去自由发挥，寻找最从第一性原理出发最高效的 pocket mobile ios 方案并实现。整个项目可以先直接在 github paperboytm org 里面放一个 pocket fork 的闭源版，然后直接在这个闭源版本的 pocket 里面，完整实现这个新的 ios example
这个项目应该叫 paperboytm/pocketjs

# PocketJS retained-tree + rendering FFI map

Architecture in one line: JS keeps a mirror tree of `NodeMirror` wrappers (`src/native-tree.ts`); every mutation calls a synchronous `ui.*` op into the Rust core (`core/src/lib.rs` `Ui`), which owns the real arena, layout (taffy), styles and per-frame `DrawList`. Two host bindings mirror the same op surface: PSP QuickJS (`native/src/ffi.rs`) and wasm (`wasm/src/lib.rs`).

# PocketJS — hosts, frame loop, input plumbing (map for input-tape time-travel)

## The one universal contract (this is your tape hook)
Every host drives frames identically: once per frame it calls **`globalThis.frame(buttons)`** with a single **PSP button bitmask integer** (spec `BTN`). There is no analog/pointer/touch anywhere in the frame contract — virtual buttons, keyboard, gamepad and PSP pad all collapse into that one `number`.

- Installed by: `src/host.ts:129` `installFrameHandler(fn)` → sets `globalThis.frame`.
- Composed in: `src/index.ts:188-192` — the handler runs, in order: `runFrameHooks(buttons)` → `handleFrame(buttons)` → `runSweep()`.
- Type is literally `(buttons: number) => void` (`src/frame.ts:9`, `src/host.ts:130`).

**Ideal tape point: wrap `globalThis.frame` (or `installFrameHandler`'s argument).** Every host funnels the entire per-frame input state (one int) through it, immediately before the core tick. Recording `buttons` per call and replaying it drives byte-exact reproduction (see determinism below).

**Location:** `native/` (Rust `#![no_std]` bin `pocketjs-psp`, target `native/targets/mipsel-sony-psp.json`). **EBOOT / bundle layout — everything is baked in, nothing loaded from ms0:/host0: at runtime:**
- `native/src/main.rs:54` `APP_JS = include_str!(OUT_DIR/game.js)` (NUL-terminated); `main.rs:58` `APP_PAK = include_bytes!(OUT_DIR/app.pak)`.

## PocketJS test/determinism infrastructure

### 1. `test/golden.ts` — headless pixel goldens
- **What's golden-tested:** byte-exact **PNG encoding of the RGBA framebuffer** (not raw framebuffer bytes, not DrawList bytes). The wasm rasterizer's RGBA8 480x272 framebuffer is captured (`test/golden.ts:336`), encoded to a deterministic PNG (`encodePNG`, `test/golden.ts:98`), and the whole PNG file is byte-compared.
- **Host / driver:** loads `host-web/pocketjs.wasm` under Bun via `createWasmUi` (`golden.ts:19,313-317`) — the **same** binding the browser host uses (`host-web/wasm-ops.js`). Per demo: fresh wasm instance, sets `globalThis.ui = wasm.ops` and `globalThis.__pak` **before** `eval`ing the `dist/<name>.js` IIFE bundle, which mounts the app and installs `globalThis.frame` (`golden.ts:318-330`).
- **Frames / input:** each `Spec` has `frames`, a `capture: number[]` of frame indices, and an optional `input: (f)=>number` returning a PSP BTN bitmask (`golden.ts:134-140`). Loop per frame: `frame(input(f))` → `wasm.tick()` (advances exactly 1/60s) → capture at wanted frames (`golden.ts:333-337`). Input examples: `hero-main` 90 frames, DOWN@5 then CIRCLE pulses (`golden.ts:142-156`).
- **Goldens stored:** `test/goldens/<name>.<frame>.png` (`golden.ts:24,368`); 35 PNGs currently. Mismatch writes `<name>.<frame>.actual.png` (`golden.ts:383`).
- **Hashing/comparison:** no hash — **full PNG byte equality** (`golden.ts:374-386`). Determinism relies on fixed-dt tick + integer/exact-f32 rasterizer + deterministic `Bun.deflateSync` (`golden.ts:13-16,87-96`). Also a degenerate-frame guard: `distinctPixels < 3` fails (`golden.ts:119-128,361`).

# PocketJS retained-tree + rendering FFI map

Architecture in one line: JS keeps a mirror tree of `NodeMirror` wrappers (`src/native-tree.ts`); every mutation calls a synchronous `ui.*` op into the Rust core (`core/src/lib.rs` `Ui`), which owns the real arena, layout (taffy), styles and per-frame `DrawList`. Two host bindings mirror the same op surface: PSP QuickJS (`native/src/ffi.rs`) and wasm (`wasm/src/lib.rs`).

## 1. JS→Rust node API

**JS wrapper objects (`NodeMirror`)** — `src/native-tree.ts:8-29`. Fields: `id:number` (native gen-tagged id), `type`, `parent`, `children[]`, `text?`, plus DOM-compat shims (`domTag`, `domAttrs`, `domNodeType`). This mirror tree is the reconciler's read model; reads never cross FFI. Root mirror = `rootMirror` (id `ROOT_ID`=1), `src/native-tree.ts:32`.

# PocketJS — hosts, frame loop, input plumbing (map for input-tape time-travel)

## The one universal contract (this is your tape hook)
Every host drives frames identically: once per frame it calls **`globalThis.frame(buttons)`** with a single **PSP button bitmask integer** (spec `BTN`). There is no analog/pointer/touch anywhere in the frame contract — virtual buttons, keyboard, gamepad and PSP pad all collapse into that one `number`.

- Installed by: `src/host.ts:129` `installFrameHandler(fn)` → sets `globalThis.frame`.
- Composed in: `src/index.ts:188-192` — the handler runs, in order: `runFrameHooks(buttons)` → `handleFrame(buttons)` → `runSweep()`.
- Type is literally `(buttons: number) => void` (`src/frame.ts:9`, `src/host.ts:130`).

**Ideal tape point: wrap `globalThis.frame` (or `installFrameHandler`'s argument).** Every host funnels the entire per-frame input state (one int) through it, immediately before the core tick. Recording `buttons` per call and replaying it drives byte-exact reproduction (see determinism below).

<result>{"plan":"# NEON RUSH — PSP ADDENDUM to the rewrite build plan

**Scope.** This addendum covers *only* the PSP EBOOT path. It assumes the desktop plan (the `neonrush-core` Rust core, the JS product bundle, the `rush`/`audio` surfaces on the pocket-mod/wgpu/cpal host) is authoritative and lands first. The PSP target reuses **the same `neonrush-core` crate and the same compiled JS+pak bundle, byte-for-byte**; it differs only in *substrate* (cargo-psp / QuickJS-raw / sceGu / sceAudio) — exactly the OpenStrike relationship (`openstrike-core` + `pocket3d-gu` + `pocketjs-psp` + raw-QuickJS `strike` surface). Every deviation below is forced by one of three PSP ceilings:

- **Time:** 16 667 µs CPU **and** 16 667 µs GPU per frame at 60 Hz; hard floor 30 fps in the worst vista. OpenStrike proves the PSP is **fill-rate / overdraw bound at 480×272, not vertex bound**.
- **Memory:** one ~single kernel block ("the arena", ~6 MB usable after the 2 MB kernel margin on a PSP-1000) shared by QuickJS + newlib + Rust `alloc` + retained textures + the per-frame vertex pool. Framebuffers/zbuffer/GE list/worker stack live outside it.
- **Fixed-function GE:** no shaders. Flat vertex color, modulate texturing, additive blend, linear fog. No compute, no post FX.

Locked location decision (human-confirmed): desktop bin at `pocket3d/examples/neonrush`; the PSP EBOOT is a **standalone lone-bin crate excluded from the desktop workspace** at **`pocket3d/crates/neonrush-psp/`** (same class as `pocket3d-gu`, `gu-demo`, `native/` — cargo-psp requires a lone bin, and workspace membership breaks desktop `cargo check` on the tier-3 target).

  4. Gravity (airborne only): `vy -= GRAVITY*dt; y += vy*dt`; on `y<=0` snap y/vy to 0, `grounded=true`, emit `Event::Land{ pos: self.player.pos() }`.

  6. Banking: `roll_deg=((target_x-x)*-22).clamp(-40,40)`; `pitch_deg = grounded?0:(-vy*2.5).clamp(-18,24)` (degrees, as Unity authors).
  7. Trails: push `(x∓0.38, BASE_Y+y, -0.75)` into `trails[0]`/`trails[1]`.

Borrows: all mutations touch `self.player.*` and `self.events.push(...)` as disjoint fields in sequence (no `&mut self.player` held across a push), so no aliasing conflict. `.clamp` is core (no_std-safe), `Vec3` from glam.

**`core/src/lib.rs`** — generation-tagged texture slots:
- `pub struct TexSlot { gen: u16, tex: Option<Texture> }` (private fields), `Ui.textures: Vec<TexSlot>` + `Ui.tex_free: Vec<u32>` (LIFO). Handle = `(gen & 0x7ff) << TEX_SLOT_BITS | slot`, bit 31 always 0, mirroring tree.rs's `GEN_MASK` wrap idiom. Slot 0/gen 0 is handle 0, so old numbering (and goldens) hold. Crate-internal `tex_resolve`/`tex_alloc` shared with draw.rs.

- `free_texture` bumps gen + pushes LIFO; stale/double frees are no-ops. `set_image`/`set_sprite` validate via `tex_resolve` instead of `>= len`.

现在实际验收效果已经可以发布。有这么几件事：
首先，我们需要把 Figma 这个 example 拆到一个独立的仓库，放在本地的 ~/code 目录下面。然后，它应该发布为 pocket-stack 组织下的 pocket-figma 项目。后续我们会继续实现 pocket-notion、pocket-linear 之类其他的项目，他们都遵守这个命名约定。
也因为我们会继续扩展出更多 Pocket 应用，所以每个这种应用都应该有一个顶层的 pocket 的工程描述文件。具体设计你可以到时候自己决定。我们的下一步应该会实现一个叫做 Pocket Studio 的 macOS 应用，提供类似 Android Studio 的能力。然后很快还会有类似 npm 的 Pocket Store，让大家去发布 UGC 的 pocket 应用。所以我希望你以这个为前提，去做这个 Pocket Figma 项目的一些 metadata 设计。
然后就是需要配置好 build 出一个带封面和标题的 EBOOT.PBP（以后标准的 pocket 应用都需要这种东西），把这个 build 出来，我稍后会自己复制到记忆棒。
最后就是要完整整理出这次成功支持 figma 的经历，写成风格与这个仓库里之前 shipping-openstrike 那篇文章类似的一篇新文章。也要有足够的截图和可视化图表。然后 figma 素材链接是 https://www.figma.com/community/file/1075811850250564922 这个
文章里希望最后要致敬 Evan Wallace，我觉得在 AI 的帮助下深入理解并还原他所创造的世界，是极为美好的经历。
基于上述背景，开始继续创作吧！

- `gen-assets.ts`: hand-rolled aliased RGBA rasterizer (rects, rounded rects, annuli, 3×5 bitmap digits, 32-step gradient — no @napi-rs/canvas), exact-match quantization to a shared palette, TILESET pyramids via `encodeTilesetEntry` with RLE self-check. # Anatomy of a GameBlocks demo (moon-racing, jet-dogfight, endless-runner)

Mirrored sources: `/private/tmp/claude-501/-Users-evan--superset-worktrees-pocketjs-malleable-dash/492c7f25-5451-4123-b957-1d5b0c035521/scratchpad/gb-demos/{moon-racing,jet-dogfight,endless-runner}/` plus a clone of the library at `.../gb-demos/gameblocks-repo/`.

## 1. Source availability

- `xt4d` has no `gb-*` repos (repos: CameraViewer, **GameBlocks**, id-pose, id-pose-web, LuTF, SparseGNV). The demo game repos are not published.
- **It doesn't matter**: the Vercel deployments are static hosting of *unbundled, unminified* ES modules. `curl https://gb-<name>.vercel.app/src/main.js` gives you the full, readable source; I crawled the complete import graphs of all three demos (34 / 26 / 18 modules; no 404s, no sourcemaps, no `package.json`, no build step at all).
- `xt4d/GameBlocks` (created 2026-07-01) is the library itself: ~60 plain-JS modules + `SKILL.md` (a 14-line Claude-style skill) + `summary.md` (244-line module catalog). SKILL.md instructs the agent to **copy selected modules verbatim into the project preserving relative paths**, adapt only if needed, and document usage in `gameblocks_usage.md`.

## 2. Build shape

Identical across all three: `index.html` + `styles.css` + `src/main.js` as native ES modules; `three@0.161.0` from a jsDelivr **importmap**; moon-racing's importmap additionally maps `@dimforge/rapier3d-compat@0.14.0` (the compat build ships wasm embedded as base64). No bundler, no minification, no tree-shaking, no assets directory.

## API summary
`createScene3dSim(): { ops: Scene3dOps, worldOf(scene): SimScene }`
- **ops** implements every `Scene3dOps` verb plus `__serialize(scene)` and `__host = "sim3d"`. Per-kind monotonic id counters (scene/node/geom/material/pool; sprite+beam pools share one namespace), ids start at 1, never reused. Dead/unknown-handle ops are silent no-ops; creates needing a dead owner return 0 instead of minting an orphan; geom/material creation always succeeds. `geomMesh`/`geomHeightfield` copy their arrays. Pool writes replace the live set, clamp to capacity, accumulate `droppedWrites = max(0, count - capacity)`, and never read past the supplied buffers. `writePoses` rounds the f32-carried id and skips unknown ids without aborting the batch. `fog` with `far <= near` disables (null). Camera defaults: p (0,0,10), identity q, fovY π/3, znear 0.1, zfar 1000.
- **worldOf** returns the live mutable `SimScene` (`{ id, root, nodes, pools, env }`; exported types `SimNode/SimGeom/SimMaterial/SimPool/SimEnv`), throwing on unknown scenes (test probe, not an op).
- **__serialize**: canonical JSON — recursively sorted keys, nodes/pools/geoms/materials in ascending id order, spatial floats `fround` + 6-significant-digit quantized (u32 colors/flags/ids pass through raw — `fround(0xffffffff)` would corrupt them), mesh/heightfield arrays digested as `{fnv, len}` (FNV-1a, host-sim pattern),  …[+2577 chars]

- **Grid**: 16×16 cells, cellSize 1, bounds 0..15 (right/forward). Player spawns (3,8) heading right; rival (12,3) heading left; initial length 4.

- **Rules**: wall/self/snake-vs-snake death (SnakePlay referee, evaluated per tick, player first); player death → gameover + best-score latch; rival death → rival respawns at start while the run continues; reversals structurally impossible (cardinal mode); pending direction is latest-press, consumed once per tick.
- **AI**: per tick, 3 non-reversal candidates; reject off-board/occupied (own body minus vacating tail, opponent's whole body); score = floodFill·spaceWeight − A*-distance-to-nearest-apple·appleWeight (unreachable = −256) + 3.5 tail-reachable bonus + straight bias. Rival weights 2 / 3 / 3.5 / 0.5 (the demo's auto-player mode, weights 2.4/3.2/0.35, was not ported — player is d-pad only per brief).

# SHERU Repository Report — for planning PocketShell (theme port to PocketJS/PSP)

## 1. What SHERU is & overall architecture

**SHERU** (シェル / "shell") is a **Finder-class macOS file manager with an always-at-hand inline terminal**, over pluggable local + cloud storage. It is *not* a desktop environment — it is a **single-window file browser**. This matters a lot for PocketShell: the "OS-retro themes" skin a **file-manager window**, not a Windows desktop. There is **no taskbar, no start menu, no dock, no wallpaper, no desktop icons** anywhere in the theme system (confirmed by grep — the only hits are a mock filename `wallpaper-4k.png` and an unrelated code comment).

It is a **Bun-workspace monorepo**. Top-level tree (`/Users/evan/code/sheru`):

```
apps/
  macos/        Swift + AppKit shell — the actual app (two view engines)
  website/      @sheru-app/website (marketing site, Wrangler-deployed)
  mobile/
packages/
  core/         sheru-core (Rust) — storage, file ops, search, PTY, prefs (C ABI)
  ui/           @sheru-app/ui — headless UI framework: token contract + parts + theme registry
  themes/       @sheru-app/themes — the theme plugins (Aqua, Win98, WinXP, Win7, XFCE, +hidden macos)
  webui/        @sheru-app/webui — the React SPA every WebView renders
  extension-*/  connector SDK + first-party connectors (github/linear/notion/adb)
  connector-github/
scripts/        Bun TypeScript orchestration (no Makefile/npm)
docs/           core-architecture.md, theme-architecture.md, web-ui-architecture.md, ...
assets/         icon.svg, icon-prism.svg (the only hand-drawn art)
```

**Architecture: one shared Rust core + a thin native shell with two swappable view engines.**

- **Native shell** = `apps/macos` (Swift/AppKit). It owns windows, menus, OS viewers, PTY. There is **no Electron/Tauri** — it is  …[+22348 chars]

## A. STYLE ENGINE

### A.1 Authoring & compilation

Styles are authored as a **build-time Tailwind subset** (not runtime CSS, not raw style props as the primary path). Compiler: **`compiler/tailwind.ts`** (668 lines). Pipeline in `scripts/build.ts` is two-pass: Babel transform collects candidate class-string literals from the AST (`compiler/solid-plugin.ts`), then `tailwind.ts` validates each literal all-or-nothing and emits `styles.bin` + `styles.generated.ts` (a `STYLE_IDS: Record<string,number>` map the renderer looks up verbatim).

Key rule (`parseClassLiteral`, tailwind.ts:488): a literal becomes a style record **iff every whitespace-separated token parses as a supported utility**, else it's treated as ordinary text and ignored. Identical records are deduped to one styleId.

Escape hatches beyond classes: `style={{…}}` objects (per-key prop diffing in `src/renderer.ts`), `animate()`/`spring()` (`src/anim.ts`), and imperative `hot.prop()`/`hot.text()` (`src/hot.ts`, used by DeepZoom/Gallery for per-frame writes). Colors accept `#rgb/#rrggbb/#rrggbbaa` via `parseHexColor` (`src/host.ts:181`).

<result># PocketShell PSP ↔ macOS Bridge — Design

## 0. Verified constraints (from code, not assumption)

These four facts shape every decision below:

1. **Inbound line-size wedge.** `native/src/dbg.rs` `poll()` reads at most `POLL_BUF = 4096` bytes and *does not advance `READ_OFF` past a line with no `\n` in the window* — a single Mac→PSP JSON line ≥ ~4 KB permanently wedges the inbound mailbox. The desktop twin (`pocket3d/crates/pocket-ui-wgpu/src/dbg.rs`) has the identical cap. **Hard protocol rule: every line written to `in.jsonl` must stay ≤ 3,800 bytes.** This kills inline-base64 icons and forces chunked directory listings.
2. **The devtools shim monopolizes the mailbox.** `src/devtools.ts` `pollTransport()` drains up to 64 chunks per poll from `ui.__dbgPoll()` and `handleMessage()` silently drops unknown `t` values (`default: break`). PocketShell cannot poll `__dbgPoll()` itself — two consumers would race for lines. **A dispatch layer in the shim is mandatory** (framework PR).
3. **No device-side file read exists.** `ffi.rs` exposes `__dbgActive/__dbgPoll/__dbgSend/__dbgShot` — write-side binary escape (`shot.raw`) exists, read-side does not. Icon pixels need a new `__dbgReadFile` FFI (the symmetric twin of `__dbgShot`), or ugly chunked base64. The FFI is a ~60-line PR across `dbg.rs`/`ffi.rs`/wgpu.
4. **Dynamic textures are already first-class.** `ops.uploadTexture(buf, w, h, PSM.PSM_8888)` (pow2 ≤ 512, copied into core RAM + GE writeback), `ops.setImage(nodeId, handle)` (exactly how `src/deepzoom.ts` swaps streamed tiles into image nodes), `ops.freeTexture(handle)`. `getOps` is exported from `src/index.ts`. Icon swap-in is the deepzoom pattern verbatim.

Also verified: app repos vendor pocketjs as a submodule and their PSP crate (`pocket-figma/crates/pocket-figma-psp/src/main.rs`) calls `pocketjs_psp::{dbg, ffi}` — new FFI registrations flow into app repos with a …[+22837 chars]

# PocketJS engine-extension roadmap for PocketShell (sheru desktop themes)

## Verified ground truth that shapes the design

1. **styles.bin is more extensible than the task assumed.** Records are flat `u8 propId + u32 value` entries; `Resolved::apply` in `core/src/style.rs:358-423` ignores unknown prop ids (`_ => {}`), `StyleTable::parse` (style.rs:114) reads exactly `styleCount` records + `animCount` timelines and **ignores trailing bytes**, and the header has an unused `u16 reserved` at offset 10. So new props need **no version bump**, and a whole new appended table (for gradient stops) can ride behind the ANIM TABLE with its count in the reserved field — v2 stays v2, old blobs decode identically, old decoders skip the new data.
2. **`active:` is compiled and resolved but never triggered.** `Ui::set_active` exists (`core/src/lib.rs:704`) but has no FFI export, no host op, and no caller in `src/input.ts` — the hero demo's `active:bg-blue-700` is currently dead. Win98 pressed-bevel inversion and press-nudge (`active:translate-x-[1]`) require wiring this end-to-end. This also decides bevel design: nested-View bevels can't invert on press because `active` is per-node.
3. **UV>1 texture repeat does NOT work cross-backend.** `wasm/src/raster.rs` clamps texel coords (lines 424-425, 499-500, 543); the wgpu samplers use default `ClampToEdge`; PSP GE wrap state is never set. Pattern fill must be emit-time tiling with UVs inside [0,1] — which is fine, because `emit_corner_quad` (draw.rs:1263) already does exactly this kind of clipped UV-subrect quad, and consecutive same-texture TEX_QUADs batch into one GE draw (`native/src/ge.rs:643-650`).

# PocketJS Input / Focus System Map (for virtual-cursor design)

Repo confirmed clean on `main`. Key finding up front: **d-pad navigation is NOT geometric — it has zero rect knowledge.** It runs entirely in JS over document order + grid index arithmetic. The only place a node rect is ever computed is the DevTools inspector, and only for a *single* node, one-way, world-AABB-only. A virtual cursor needs a genuinely new hit-testing capability; nothing today does point→node.

---

## 1. `src/input.ts` — the full input/focus flow

The header comment (`src/input.ts:1-19`) is the design charter and states the constraint explicitly: *"Focus model (v1, no layout access from JS [R]): Default traversal order = DOCUMENT ORDER over the mirror tree, derived lazily (a DFS per navigation press)."*

**Module state** (`src/input.ts:25-30`):
```ts
let root, focused, pressedNode: NodeMirror | null = null;
let prevButtons = 0;
const focusScopeStack: NodeMirror[] = [];
const focusGridStack: FocusGridRegistration[] = [];
```

**Per-frame entry — `handleFrame(buttons)`** (`src/input.ts:329-343`). This is the ENTIRE input tick. Payload is a single `number` = the spec `BTN` bitmask. No analog, no touch — those are latched separately (see §3, §6):
```ts
export function handleFrame(buttons: number): void {
  const pressed = buttons & ~prevButtons;
  const released = prevButtons & ~buttons;
  prevButtons = buttons;
  if (released & BTN.CIRCLE) setPressedNode(null);   // release-edge
  if (pressed === 0) return;
  if (pressed & BTN.DOWN) moveFocus("down");
  if (pressed & BTN.RIGHT) moveFocus("right");
  if (pressed & BTN.UP) moveFocus("up");
  if (pressed & BTN.LEFT) moveFocus("left");
  if (pressed & BTN.CIRCLE) { setPressedNode(focused); firePress(); }
}
```

plans.plan:
# PocketShell — sheru 主题移植到 PocketJS（新仓库 + 引擎扩展）

## Context

sheru（~/code/sheru）用 webview 渲染 Win98/XP/Win7/Aqua/XFCE 风格的文件管理器主题；PocketShell 要把这些主题移植到 PocketJS 自己的布局/样式引擎上（PSP 480×272），以 webview 级 feature parity 为标尺，倒逼 pocket 样式引擎基建（bevel 边框、多停靠点渐变、逐角圆角、平铺填充、滚动条等）。次级目标：按键交互，以及经 PSPLINK 邮箱桥接在 PSP 上浏览/启动真实 macOS 应用。

已确认的关键事实（探索阶段验证过源码）：
- sheru 主题是**纯数据**：88 token schema（`packages/ui/src/tokens/schema.ts`）+ 作用域 CSS 字符串（`packages/themes/src/<id>/css.ts`）+ 声明式 glyph JSON；**零图片/字体资产**；组件用 `data-part`/`data-state` 契约（`packages/ui/src/parts.ts`）。sheru 是单个文件管理器窗口，不是桌面（无任务栏/开始菜单）。webview 可以浏览器+mock bridge 独立运行，`?theme=<id>` 深链。
- PocketJS 样式是编译期 Tailwind 子集 → `styles.bin`；**模块里所有字符串字面量都会被编译**（`compiler/jsx-plugin.ts:158`），`.generated.ts` 除外 → cooked 主题表可行。PROP 表 visual 区 73-95 / text 区 101+ 空闲。styles.bin 对未知 prop 宽容、header offset 10 有保留 u16、表尾字节被忽略 → **新 prop 无需版本升级**。
- `active:` 变体已编译/已解析但从未被触发（`core/src/lib.rs:704` `set_active` 无调用方）。
- 三后端（PSP GE / wgpu / wasm 软光栅）消费同一 DrawList；连续 RECT 在 GE 上合批（bevel≈免费），GRAD_RECT 不合批（多停靠点渐变的预算风险点）。UV>1 平铺三后端都不支持 → 平铺必须 emit 期切 quad。
- DevTools 邮箱（`native/src/dbg.rs` + `scripts/devtools-bridge.ts`）：入站单行 >~4KB 会永久卡死轮询（POLL_BUF=4096 不推进）→ 协议必须分块；`src/devtools.ts` 独占 `__dbgPoll` → 需加前缀通道注册；设备端无文件读 FFI → 图标像素需新增 `__dbgReadFile`。
- pocket-figma 是新仓库模板：vendor submodules（pocketjs/rust-psp/quickjs-rs）+ tsconfig paths 指向 vendored src + 无依赖 package.json（setup 建 symlink）+ Bun 脚本 + pocket.json 清单 + wasm 字节级 golden。Rust nightly-2026-05-28。

用户决策：GitHub 建 **pocket-stack/pocket-shell**；本次实现**首波 = pocketjs PR1+PR2 + pocket-shell 脚手架 + M1 Win98 静态 chrome + parity 板 v1**。

## 总体架构（三条腿）

1. **主题移植管线（pocket-shell 内，混合式）**：`tools/sync-sheru.ts` 直接 `import` sheru 主题模块，快照 tokens/chrome/iconGlyphs → `themes-src/sheru/<id>.json`（含 sheru commit 溯源）；css.ts 规则**逐条手工翻译**为结构化 paint spec（`themes-src/paint/<id>.ts`，值全部 token 引用）；`tools/cook-themes.ts` 合成 → `app/theme/cooked/<id>.cooked.ts`（part×state → 完整 class 字面量，用 vendored `compileClasses` 回环校验，bake 失败即报错）+ pak 资产（渐变条/dither/glyph）。选择器映射：`:hover`→`focus:`、`:active`→`active:`（PR2 后原生）、`[data-state=*]`/`[data-focused=false]`→class-key 后缀查表。glyph 走 bake 期光栅化：glyph JSON → SVG（镜像 `GlyphDrawingSvg.tsx` 的 paint 解析）→ headless Chromium 截图 → CLUT8 IMG pak 条目；运行时 `Glyph.tsx` 就是一个 `<Image>`。
2. **引擎扩展（pocketjs 框架 PR 序列）**：全部 emit 期组合、零 DrawList/后端改动（除 PR2 的 FFI 管线和或有的 PR8 perf）。见路线图。
3. **Mac 桥接（后期波次）**：`shell.*` JSON-line 协议骑在 dbg 邮箱上（分块 ≤3800B/行；图标以 raw RGBA 32×32 文件落盘 + JSON 通知，设备 `__dbgReadFile`→`uploadTexture`）；Mac 侧 Bun 守护进程经 `startBridge({handlers})` 钩子注册；设备侧 `ShellProvider` 接口 mock/bridge 双实现。图标提取：Info.plist→sips 快路径 + JXA `NSWorkspace.iconForFile` 兜底 + 缓存。安全：白名单根目录、仅 .app 启动、固定 argv、限速。

## 完整路线图（后续波次，本次不实现）

**pocketjs 引擎 PR**（PR1/PR2 属首波，其余后续）：
- PR3 `feat(style): per-corner radius` — PROP 73-76（radiusTL/TR/BR/BL，f32，NaN=继承）；draw.rs rounded 管线收 `[f32;4]`；uniform 情况走原代码路径保 golden 字节不变。XP 顶部圆角。
- PR4 `feat(style): multi-stop gradients` — header 保留位→gradCount，ANIM TABLE 后追加 GRAD 表（stopCount×{u32 色,u16 位}），PROP.gradStops=82；emit 期切成相邻 2-stop GRAD_RECT 带；`bg-stops-[...]` utility；gradFrom/To 镜像首尾停靠点做旧核降级。角度渐变近似到轴向。
- PR5 `feat(style): tiled pattern fill` — PROP.bgPattern=83（纹理句柄），emit 期 UV 子矩形切 quad 平铺；`usePatternTexture(pakKey)` helper。Win98 dither / Aqua 细条纹。
- PR6 `feat(components): ScrollView + onButtonRepeat` — 框架层滚动（overflow-hidden 视口 + translateY 条带 + 行窗口挂载，Gallery 模式），滚动条主题化留在 app 侧；确定性按键重复。
- PR7 `feat(style): text shadow` — PROP 101-103，emit_text 出两遍 glyph run。
- PR8 `perf(psp): batch GRAD_RECTs`（仅当 XP 实测超 ~40 draw call 预算）。

**pocket-shell 里程碑**（M0/M1 属首波）：
- M2 内部件+交互：Toolbar/Breadcrumbs/Sidebar/FileList(mock VFS)/StatusBar + 十字键焦点导航；密度表调优。
- M3 年代字体（槽位别名：W95FA 或 Pixel Operator→98/XP、Selawik→Win7、DejaVu→XFCE、Inter→Aqua；**W95FA 许可需先核实**，兜底 Pixel Operator）+ 文件图标 16/32 全管线。
- M4 全部 5 主题 + 渐变条纹理过渡（引擎 PR4 落地前的桥）+ L/R 主题切换。
- M5 Dialog/Menu/IconGrid（Portal/Modal/FocusGrid）→ 5 主题 × 9 场景 golden 矩阵。
- M6 引擎特性逐个采纳（BevelBox→原生 prop、渐变条→bg-stops、dither→bgPattern、ScrollArea→ScrollVie …[+6099 chars]

humanMessages.text:
现在 ui-runtime-that-cant-flake 这篇文章基本覆盖了 Pocket 里面最核心的一种时间旅行状态管理能力。现在要结合另一个大的背景，帮我整理一下思路。

首先我希望做一个类似模拟人生的游戏，这个游戏的一个基本思想是，里面参与的人可以是 agent。这个游戏里面会连着我们的沙盒服务：游戏里的 3D 场景中会有一台电脑，上面开着一个网站，而这个网站是在游戏服务器上托管的一个真的网站（这个也是我想要去做 PocketJS 的一个动力。也就是说 3D 场景里的网站要渲染在游戏里面，会需要 Pocket 这样的一个类似游戏引擎的可嵌入的渲染器）。Agent 会在这个游戏里面真的去写代码，他们写出来的代码，会真的给他们的用户去用，这些网站在游戏里都是有用户在用的，而这些用户也是 Agent。在这个游戏里面还会有公司组织的概念，一个完全由 agent 组成的公司，会编写产品给另一个由 agent 组成的公司去使用。如果这个产品不好的话，客户是真的会流失给其他的竞争对手的。或者也有那种投放广告之类的公司，会有其他 Agent 去看，然后决定要不要点广告。这两个都只是随便想到的例子，最后我们能纳入的东西可能会大很多。然后比如一个维护某个网站的 agent，当它发现自己的输入太多时，可以自己去招募一个子 agent，并为其分配时间预算和目标。这类似于公司的 OKR 制度，能够真正去拆解这些任务。这时候就有一个问题：如果这些目标都很琐碎或者不够大，那么 Agent 可能自己直接就把它做了，而不是去招募其他 Agent。我理解是只有当输入的信息非常多，比如说持续串流给到 Agent 很多新的、实时的世界输入，比如说，这个游戏世界里有股市，以及决定股价的所有真实世界里的信息，我们提供一份模拟，大概是这样的。

于是这里有一个需要判断的问题。我们有一个假设：只有当信息持续不断地大量到来，让当前 Agent 处理不完时，它才会主动去创建子 Agent（也就是招募员工）。这个假设是否成立？或者你觉得有什么其他最适合的场景，能够迫使它一定要招募员工，否则就无法完成任务？比如，我觉得真正意义上的“创业”就是一个很明显的、一个人或一个 Agent 没法自己全部做完的场景。这个世界应该是允许做所有真正意义上的创业这件事情的。然后 Agent 也要知道自己为此要做多久，然后评估自己是不是能处理得完。如果处理不完，它就会去派生出子 Agent。首先，希望帮我判断一下这个事情是否成立。

然后就到了下一个关键的问题。我希望确定，如果大量的事件流源源不断地到来，而 Agent 在接入 LLM 后，其推理时间又存在速度上的差异，那么此时游戏里的时间概念应该如何设计？我们需要同时满足两个场景下的体验：首先玩家视角，作为人类玩家，观看游戏推进时的视觉效果必须足够好，就像在玩《模拟人生》一样自然。其次评测视角，系统必须允许在虚拟时间轴上以极快的速度把所有事件完整跑一遍，以便我们基于这套体系进行 Eval。因为游戏实际上只是这个系统的一个界面，我们真正要做的是设计这种 Agent 协作的系统，并持续优化它们的性能。在这种情况下，虚拟时间轴的概念非常重要，但我目前还没有想清楚到底该怎么去建模这些东西。

最后还有一个问题：在这个世界里面，怎么样能够有一个可持续的经济机制，或者是类似于资本主义的那些核心要素？大概要怎么去实现它？比如真实世界里面是有银行的，我觉得就不能变成游戏里每个回合随便给人发钱。它不是一个简单的大富翁游戏。在这个世界里面，到底钱从哪里来？钱怎么在这套经济体系里面去流转？这个我也希望要一起考虑进来。因为决定 Agent 是否做某件事，类似于创业或者是扩张团队，这个时候核心的要素是预算。那这个时候预算就是这里面游戏里的货币。但我还没有想好，这个东西如果从第一性原理出发，到底需要具备哪些要素，才能自然地运转起来？

根据我的这些碎片化的反馈，去推断出我真正想要的到底是一个什么样的东西，然后也帮我理清思路，解答这些问题。我觉得我现在只能模糊地看到 big picture，但是还有好几处关键的点没有真正的打通。这非常需要你的帮助。我希望你也应该结合你在游戏里会怎么行动，去告诉我这个游戏从根源上应该被设计成什么样。比如时间怎么流动，货币体系怎么去建构之类。

# PocketJS monorepo — findings for planning `pocket-youtube` (app + macOS host)

## Orienting fact (important for your plan)

The `pocket-<product>` apps are **not** in this monorepo. `pocket-figma` lives in its own repo (`github.com/pocket-stack/pocket-figma`), and its build calls into this repo's engine. What this repo (`pocketjs`) contains is: (a) the **runtime/engine** those apps link (`src/`, `core/`, `native/`), (b) **in-repo reference apps** under `demos/` (each folder is a full app), and (c) the **host-side tooling** (`scripts/`, `host-web/`). The DeepZoom/Figma-style first-party app in-repo is `demos/zoomlab`. Plan `pocket-youtube` as either a new `demos/<name>/` folder here or a sibling repo consuming `@pocketjs/framework`; the machinery below is identical either way.

# PocketJS Repository Report: USB Streaming Feasibility for a PSP YouTube Viewer

Root: `/Users/evan/.superset/worktrees/pocketjs/goofy-piper` (monorepo, flat layout — no `packages/`; the workspace root package is `@pocketjs/framework` v0.4.0). Native PSP host lives in `native/`, the TS framework in `src/`, host tooling in `scripts/` and `host-web/`.

Two upfront findings that shape any implementation plan:
- There is **no native video, audio, or Media Engine code anywhere** (scePsmfPlayer / sceMpeg / sceAtrac / sceAudio produce zero hits in `native/`, `native-vita/`, `core/`, `src/`). "Video" exists only as HTML `<video>` tags on the marketing site and as a marketing-outro skill. The closest streaming-pixel primitive that actually ships is `<DeepZoom>`.
- The only Mac↔PSP bridge that exists today is the **DevTools file-mailbox over usbhostfs** (a JSON-line duplex built on two append-only files). The app-facing "network" API (the effect shell used by Pocket Talk) is **pure JS with no native transport** — it does not cross USB. A real host→PSP frame feed would have to be built on the mailbox pattern, not the effect shell.

## 1. USB transport layer (PSPLINK / usbhostfs mailbox)

### PSP-side (Rust)
`/Users/evan/.superset/worktrees/pocketjs/goofy-piper/native/src/dbg.rs` — the entire device-side transport.
- Channel = two files on the usbhostfs share: `host0:/pocketjs-dbg/in.jsonl` (host→PSP) and `out.jsonl` (PSP→host), gated by `host0:/pocketjs-dbg/enable`. Fallback root `ms0:/…` for PPSSPP GUI.
- Key functions: `init()` (probes enable file, seeks `in.jsonl` to EOF so old commands are skipped), `poll() -> Option<String>`, `send(msg: &[u8])`, `shot() -> bool`, `active()`.

[Image #1] UI 大概做成这种布局，现在列表里每一项只占宽度的一半，没有办法横向撑满整个屏幕。[Image #2] 键盘需要参考 LVGL 这样的布局形式，现在那种均匀的布局 UX 很奇怪。

这样布局之后，它应该被提升成一种系统级的组件，而不是每个应用自己在 demo 里去实现。跟键盘相关的事情，应该被封装成一种在 PSP 这种场景下框架通用的能力。

像 PS Vita 后面应该也会用到同样的键盘组件，但是 capability 是不同的：
1. PSP 是用按键来操作键盘，也就是用方向键来定位操作
2. Vita 是要用触摸屏的

我们需要基于此设计出合理的封装抽象，而不是让每个 demo 都单独、独立地去复制粘贴一份键盘的逻辑。

[Image #1] UI 大概做成这种布局，现在列表里每一项只占宽度的一半，没有办法横向撑满整个屏幕。[Image #2] 键盘需要参考 LVGL 这样的布局形式，现在那种均匀的布局 UX 很奇怪。

这样布局之后，它应该被提升成一种系统级的组件，而不是每个应用自己在 demo 里去实现。跟键盘相关的事情，应该被封装成一种在 PSP 这种场景下框架通用的能力。

像 PS Vita 后面应该也会用到同样的键盘组件，但是 capability 是不同的：
1. PSP 是用按键来操作键盘，也就是用方向键来定位操作
2. Vita 是要用触摸屏的

我们需要基于此设计出合理的封装抽象，而不是让每个 demo 都单独、独立地去复制粘贴一份键盘的逻辑。

我现在注意到，现在每个视频条目的右侧有一个浅色的小三角图标。那个小三角图标边上的上下位置出现了圆角，但这个圆角并没有出现在最右侧，而是还有一小段距离。

所以没有被选中的条目，它真正的右上角和右下角实际上仍然是没有圆角的。圆角的部分反而是从条目大概往左五六十个像素左右的位置出现，这个效果有点奇怪，不知道是不是布局问题。

很好，这些目标都很有意义。但现在我认为最大的里程碑是先把 Pocket YouTube 这个项目发布到 Pocket Stack 下面，然后参考之前的博客风格，写出一篇完整的博客文章。

文章里需要多准备一些漂亮的可视化图表，比如可以参考 Figma 那篇文章的图表风格。文章最上面应该是有 YouTube 这个应用的一小段动图比如说大概这样的东西 因为绝大部分人都不熟悉音视频和 PSP 图形驱动这种东西，所以如果要讲解这部分的话，配套的一些科普其实也是需要的。

但我最希望的还是说，这是一篇能够体现出我们工程技术深度，以及最后 PocketJS 的 DX（开发者体验）带来的这种价值的技术向宣传文章。它应该是那种 Hacker News 的读者看了以后，会觉得非常了不起的一篇文章。
